arts.ttl: Inside Jamie McGrath Aberdeen replacement hunt as Jimmy Thelin makes frank confession over future Hibs star
arts.sum: The Ireland international will become a Hibee in the summer when he leaves Pittodrie after agreeing a long term Easter Road deal

arts.ttl: Celtic's Maeda 'wrongly denied equaliser against Hibs'
arts.sum: Daizen Maeda's ruled-out equaliser in Celtic's 2-1 defeat by Hibernian on Saturday should have stood, the Scottish FA's key match incident panel rules.

arts.ttl: Brendan Rodgers sees Celtic VAR gripe vindicated as KMI panel returns verdict on disallowed Daizen Maeda goal
arts.sum: The Japan star thought he had levelled things up against Hibs only to then see VAR chalk it off

arts.ttl: Preview: Hibernian vs. Hearts - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Sunday's Scottish Premiership clash between Hibernian and Hearts, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
